title: Storyline
summary: A rough outline of the current story arc and major beats.
intro: This page is a placeholder narrative overview, built to show how the wiki can hold campaign summaries now and more granular quest breakdowns later.
facts: Story pages often need spoiler-safe summaries near the top and deeper sections lower down.
JSON makes it straightforward to keep a clean summary view while the page grows more detailed over time.
This entry focuses on structure rather than final canon text.

sections.heading: Opening Beat
paragraphs: The story begins with the team operating near the edge of familiar territory, where a routine objective exposes signs that the wider region is becoming unstable.
This first beat should establish tone, key relationships, and the initial mystery without overwhelming the player.

sections.heading: Midgame Pressure
paragraphs: The middle act raises stakes by forcing returns to known locations under changed conditions. That gives the world a sense of progression while also reinforcing character arcs.
items: Camp upgrades unlock new strategies and dialogue.
Traversal routes become more dangerous or more flexible.

sections.heading: Late Reveal
paragraphs: The late-game reveal should reframe earlier discoveries, then push the player toward a decisive choice that ties the central mystery back to the cast's personal stakes.
items: Clarify what the team misunderstood in the opening act.
Resolve at least one relationship arc before the finale.
Leave room for aftermath pages or sequel hooks in the wiki.
